en: Coming in from Warner Brothers Studios, it's Conan!
The hell was that? Someone close my eyes!
ko: 뭐야 저거? 누가 내 눈 좀 감겨줘!

en: Get this gang, check this out. We got a lot of laughs. Get the TV started.
ko: 여러분 이거 보세요. 웃긴 거 많아요. TV 틀어.

en: Ding dong, come on in. Ow.
Go back to sleep. Hey. Can't go use the bathroom. I gotta go to the bathroom.
ko: 다시 자러 가. 야. 화장실 못 가. 나 화장실 가야 돼.

en: Best place to have diarrhea. Sure is. Oh! Oh! Oh! Oh!
ko: 설사하기 딱 좋은 곳이지. 맞아. 오! 오! 오! 오!
